agents.name: Clothing Advice Agent

No structured patch governance was exercised during file creation

agents.name: Umbrella Agent
agents.question: Should I bring an umbrella today?
agents.note: Umbrella agent was the prior milestone proof case. Created through prior Stage A/B process, not part of this Phase 3 work.

verdict_reason: Phase 3 acceptance criteria substantially met. 6/7 criteria pass. Gap: patch-application mechanism is incomplete (files written by OpenCode server directly, not through structured patch governance). Core agent code was Stage A (pre-existing). helpers.py and labels.py were pipeline-generated with traceable provenance.
governed_generation_note: Pipeline orchestrates LLM calls correctly (3 PASS verdicts). OpenCode server writes files. However, the structured patch governance pipeline (proposed_patch.diff → applied_patch.diff) is not exercised — all runs show 'no patch applied'. This is a known limitation.
